content.en:
"Extinction Realm Lord, it's you!"

When the White Bone Realm Lord saw this Fourth Realm who suddenly attacked, his face changed drastically.

This is the Lord of the Extinction Realm, and he is also quite famous in the Four Thousand Realm, although his cultivation years are far inferior to him, but he is also an extremely demonic Fourth Realm, who has comprehended the multi-dimensional mastery of the Four Realms, and the Transcendent Rule Realm has also reached about 10,000 Dao, and his cultivation has also reached the peak realm of the Fourth Realm.

And it is rumored that this Extinction Realm Lord has also cultivated an extremely powerful innate multi-dimensional Dao body, and has cultivated to the third layer realm.

It can be said that the attack of the Extinction Realm Lord is extremely terrifying.

If you talk about the disadvantage, it is that the soul will of the Extinction Realm Lord is not high, and it is said that he has not yet stepped into the eighth dimension, which is also the Extinction Realm Lord is not born of a great force, but belongs to the kind of scattered cultivation, and the treasures that enhance the soul will are extremely rare, so he naturally cannot easily raise the soul will.

Rumble!

The attack of the Extinction Realm Lord directly broke through the White Bone Realm Lord's ten-dimensional treasure shield, but after it was broken, the attack power was not strong, and it could only slightly injure the White Bone Realm Lord.

However, the defenses are broken, and that's enough.

Ye Tian also seized the opportunity and instantly cast the Eighth Dimension Will Peerless Technique-Wumu Sword.

"Wumu sword, slash!"

Ye Tian's attack penetrated the White Bone Realm Lord's body and slashed directly at his soul will.

It stands to reason that the soul will of the White Bone Realm Lord has also reached the eighth dimension, but unfortunately his injuries are too great, and countless years have passed, his soul will has been extremely weak, it seems to be the eighth dimension, but in fact it is only the strength of the seventh dimension.

Therefore, the black mother sword slashed into his soul will, and every wisp of will was annihilated under the attack of the black mother sword.

In an instant, the soul will of the White Bone Realm Lord was completely wiped out.

The Lord of the White Bone Realm has fallen!

After killing the White Bone Realm Lord, Ye Tianyi waved his hand, took away the corpse of the White Bone Realm Lord, and then broke through the formation of this treasure house with this Extinction Realm Lord.

They didn't have time to share the spoils, so they served all the treasures here in one pot first.

"Let's go! I can't stay here!"

The Lord of the Extinction Realm said.

"Why, I still want to absorb some ten-dimensional treasure liquid!" Ye Tian said.

The Extinction Realm Lord hurriedly persuaded: "I have just obtained some ten-dimensional treasure liquid in the treasure house, don't be greedy, the Chilin Clan is not that simple." As you have just seen, that White Bone Realm Lord is already in a state of fall, but with a trace of the power of the Ten Tailed Treasure Tree, it can form an extremely powerful defense. In fact, the Chilin clan also has hole cards, which can draw more power from the Ten Tailed Treasure Tree to form an indiscriminate attack. It's just that the price paid for this blow is too great, and the Chilin clan will only use it when they are desperate. Once that blow is unleashed, the Fifth Realm will be completely destroyed. "

"How do you know?"

Ye Tian was puzzled.

"I heard it!" "I can hide in the fifth dimension, and the method of constricting the aura is very powerful, it is not easy for the Chilin clan to find me, I got this information by accident." Now, we have reaped the benefits, and in a little while, the Chilin Clan will be completely defeated, and in desperation, they will definitely use this means of ending together. "

"Okay, then leave!"

Ye Tian agreed.

Swish!!!

They fled quickly, and with the two joining forces, the Chilin Clan or the Taiwu Sword Sect couldn't stop them at all.

Soon, they were gone.

......

After leaving the battlefield.

Ye Tian and the Extinction Realm Lord stopped.

Immediately, they began to divide the resources and treasures.

No matter what grade of resources, they are divided equally, which is also very fair.

At this time, the Lord of the Extinction Realm said: "Under the Lord of the Extinction Realm, I don't know what to call my friend?"

Although he said that he cooperated with Ye Tian, he still didn't know Ye Tian's name.

"Ye Tian Realm Lord!"

Ye Tian introduced himself.

"It turned out to be Ye Tian Realm Lord!" The Extinction Realm Lord wanted to befriend Ye Tian, so he informed Ye Tian of his communication method, "If you can still cooperate in the future, you can cooperate when the time comes!"

He attaches great importance to Ye Tian's eighth dimensional will mastery, even in the four thousand realm, it is very rare to be able to comprehend the will mastery, and he hides in the fifth dimension to see it very clearly, Ye Tian not only knows the will mastery, but also the four realms multi-dimensional mastery, and even practiced two innate multi-dimensional dao bodies, and the physical body has not collapsed, it must be a secret technique that will fuse the innate multi-dimensional dao body.

He doesn't know that kind of secret art.

Ye Tian's only weakness is that the realm of extra-dimensional rules is still very low, and if he is promoted, his strength will naturally far surpass him.

"Good!"

Ye Tian nodded slightly.

He also attaches great importance to the strength of the Extinction Realm Lord, his attack power is even stronger than his current strength, and his attack power will definitely not surpass the Extinction Realm Lord in a short period of time.

After exchanging contact information, Ye Tian talked to the Extinction Realm Lord.

"Extinction Realm Lord, is there a lot of Fourth Realm like you, the Four Thousand Realm?"

Ye Tian asked.

"There are quite a few!" "There are too many Fourth Realms here, and many of them have been preparing for the impact on the Fifth Realm, even I don't necessarily know them, and there are even Fourth Realms that have lived several multi-dimensional tribulations, the strength of these Fourth Realms is extremely terrifying, and the Extradimensional Rule Realm may reach more than 30,000 extradimensional rules, or even forty or fifty thousand or even seventy or eighty thousand extradimensional rules." It's just that these Fourth Realms have been hit hard in the Multidimensional Tribulation, so they can't break through to the Fifth Realm. "

"The multi-dimensional catastrophe is devastated?"

Ye Tian was puzzled, and then asked curiously: "Just like the White Bone Realm Lord before, how did they get hit hard and still haven't recovered?"

Seeing that Ye Tian didn't even know this, the Lord of the Extinction Realm guessed that Ye Tian was also a casual cultivator (Zhao Hao), but he had been cultivating hard and had only recently come out of the customs.

So, he introduced: "I don't know much about the Multidimensional Tribulation, but I only obtained information about the Multidimensional Tribulation in a lineage. During the multi-dimensional tribulation, there will be all kinds of terrifying tribulations, such as the last multi-dimensional tribulation, a terrifying tribulation was generated, this tribulation wind is very terrifying, if you don't cultivate the innate multi-dimensional Dao body to the second level of the Dacheng realm, then you will be blown to death in an instant. That White Bone Realm Lord was in the last exploration of the Multidimensional Tribulation, he encountered a strong enemy, and finally was unable to resist the Tribulation Wind of the Multidimensional Tribulation, his body was severely damaged, and the power of the Tribulation Wind penetrated into his bloodline and soul will, unless it was a powerful Fifth Realm that could heal his injuries. "

"I see!"

Ye Tian somewhat understood.

After that, he chatted with the Extinction Realm Lord for a while longer, and also learned more information.

Soon after, the Lord of the Extinction departed.
